name: Activation issue — fired when it shouldn't, or didn't when it should
about: The skill activated wrong, or failed to activate when it should have.

## The prompt

<!-- Paste the exact prompt. Include prior conversation if relevant. -->

## What happened

- [ ] The skill **activated** but I didn't want it to.
- [ ] The skill **did NOT activate** but I wanted it to.
- [ ] The skill activated but picked the wrong sub-mode (explain / reframe / plan).

## What you expected

<!-- "I expected the skill to stay off because this is a regex-performance question."
"I expected the skill to activate because I asked for a customer-impact summary."
"I expected reframe mode but got explain." -->

## Why

<!-- Optional but very useful. Which trigger phrase fits? Which do-not-use-for clause covers it? -->

## Environment

- Claude Code version:
- Skill version (from `metadata.version` in `SKILL.md`):
- Persistent mode (`view on`) currently active? yes / no
